Value: CHLORTHALIDONE REDUCES CALCIUM OXALATE CALCULOUS RECURRENCE BUT MAGNESIUM HYDROXIDE DOES NOT

Randomly assigned on the basis of medical record number
Identical-appearing active drug or placebo groups
